name: BL: Bike It Stock Sync v2

body.subject: ={{`✅ Bike It Stock Sync: ${$json.upserted} products updated`}}
body.html:
={{`

✅ Bike It Stock Sync Complete

${$json.upsert_errors > 0 ? '' : ''}
Total rows from Bike It${$json.total_from_bikeit}
Eligible (passed filters)${$json.eligible}
Skipped — fasteners/bolts${$json.skipped_fastener}
Skipped — SRP under £50${$json.skipped_lowvalue}
✅ Upserted to Supabase${$json.upserted}
⚠️ Errors' + $json.upsert_errors + '

Ran at: ${$json.run_at} • Next run in ~6h

`}}
